title: Installation - Agent Vault
rawContent: Installation - Agent Vault Skip to main content Agent Vault home page Search... ⌘ K Ask AI Search... Navigation Getting Started Installation Getting Started Introduction Installation Tutorial Quickstart Claude Code Cursor Codex OpenClaw Hermes Agent OpenCode Custom Agent Guides Connect Agents Self-Hosting Learn Vaults Credentials Services Proposals Permissions Agents Security Resources CLI reference close On this page Next steps Getting Started Installation Get a server running in under a minute. Documentation Index Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://docs.agent-vault.dev/llms.txt Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Agent Vault ships as a single binary that acts as both a server and CLI client. Each install method below configures a master password at startup. Store it somewhere safe. The password wraps the data encryption key and is held only in memory once the server is unlocked. Script Docker From source Auto-detects your OS and architecture (macOS on Intel or Apple Silicon, Linux on x86_64 or ARM64), downloads the latest release, and installs. curl --proto '=https' --proto-redir '=https' --tlsv1.2 -fsSL https://get.agent-vault.dev | sh Start the Agent Vault server (pass -d to run in the background): export AGENT_VAULT_ADDR = "http://<your-host>:14321" agent-vault server docker run -it -p 14321:14321 -p 14322:14322 \ -e AGENT_VAULT_MASTER_PASSWORD=your-password \ -e AGENT_VAULT_ADDR="http://<your-host>:14321" \ -v agent-vault-data:/data infisical/agent-vault See Docker deployment for Compose, volumes, and full configuration. Prerequisites : Go 1.25+ , Node.js 22+ git clone https://github.com/Infisical/agent-vault.git cd agent-vault make build sudo mv agent-vault /usr/local/bin/ Start the Agent Vault server (pass -d to run in the background): export AGENT_VAULT_ADDR = "http://<your-host>:14321" agent-vault server Agent Vault exposes two listeners: the HTTP API on 14321 and the transparent MITM proxy on 14322 (the canonical ingress for agents). Open http://<your-host>:14321/register (the hostname or address where you deployed Agent Vault) to create your account. The first user becomes the instance owner with admin on the default vault . ​ Next steps Connect an agent Setup guides for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more. Need to verify the release signature or upgrade later? See Maintenance .
